Satan shoots you a text from

where he sits in the library.

He wonders if you'd like to

read or study with him. Or,

perhaps he just wants to see

you?

{

Helloooo, I finally made Satan!!! I've been liking him a lot more lately. I am currently making more. More of this series. I will be making one of each character from the original Obey Me! game, and from there, I will see how far requests go or whatever series I wanna do next. Errrr, Idk if i'll make the side characters unless someone asks, lowkey...

In this scenario, it may take place at any point in the actual (game) story. I believe there are enough tokens for it to fit all of your tastes. Let me know about any issues with the bot.

(Mind you, any generated responses don't directly derive from the author, so issues like it repeating things or doing anything wacky are not my writing (unless I say so, of course.) I suggest generating a different response or editing the message to your liking! <3)

}
